pr.title: Fix incorrect static in ittomato and mark as matching
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2202 fixed two ittomato functions that had been declared static in the C file by moving their prototypes to ittomato.h, then changed configure.py to mark melee/it/items/ittomato.c as Matching. The slice contains no PR body text or review comments; bot output reports small linked code and data improvements.

key_files.role: Build/decomp status configuration changed Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/ittomato.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ittomato.c").
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk at MatchingFor(*versions)
changed_files.jsonl: configure.py added 1 deleted 1

key_files.role: Removed source-local static prototypes for it_802841B4 and it_8028428C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittomato.c hunk removing static Item_GObj* it_802841B4(...) and static void it_8028428C(...)
changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/ittomato.c added 0 deleted 3

key_files.role: Added non-static header prototypes for it_802841B4 and it_8028428C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittomato.h hunk adding prototypes
changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/ittomato.h added 2 deleted 0

what_changed.text: ittomato.c was promoted from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/ittomato.c") changed to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ittomato.c")

what_changed.text: The prototypes for it_802841B4 and it_8028428C were removed as static declarations from ittomato.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ittomato.c removed static prototypes at offsets 2841B4 and 28428C

what_changed.text: The same two functions were declared in ittomato.h as externally visible prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ittomato.h added Item_GObj* it_802841B4(Item_GObj* gobj, Vec3* arg1, s32 arg2)
raw_diff: ittomato.h added void it_8028428C(Item_GObj* gobj)

smart_moves.text: Before marking the item object as Matching, the PR corrected header ownership for functions that should not remain source-local static prototypes.
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix incorrect static in ittomato and mark as matching
raw_diff: ittomato.c static prototypes removed and ittomato.h prototypes added
raw_diff: configure.py marks ittomato.c Matching

decomp_lessons.text: A matching-status change can depend on fixing linkage/prototype surface, not only function body edits. If a function is incorrectly declared static in the C file, move the proven externally visible prototype to the owning header before marking the object matching.
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix incorrect static in ittomato and mark as matching
raw_diff: ittomato.c removed static declarations for it_802841B4 and it_8028428C
raw_diff: ittomato.h added public prototypes for the same functions
raw_diff: configure.py changed ittomato.c to Matching

naming_conventions.text: The PR preserved address-style function names it_802841B4 and it_8028428C rather than inventing semantic names while only changing their declaration scope.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: prototypes use it_802841B4 and it_8028428C in both removed static declarations and added header declarations

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Tactic used: correct function linkage by removing incorrect static declarations from the implementation file and adding header prototypes, then update configure.py from NonMatching to Matching for the object.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ittomato.c prototype removals
raw_diff: ittomato.h prototype additions
raw_diff: configure.py matching-status change

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fix declaration scope before marking an object matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a decomp object is otherwise ready to be marked Matching, check whether functions are incorrectly source-local static. If their signatures are established and they need external visibility, move prototypes to the owning header rather than keeping static declarations in the C file.
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix incorrect static in ittomato and mark as matching
raw_diff: ittomato.c removed static prototypes
raw_diff: ittomato.h added corresponding prototypes
raw_diff: configure.py changed ittomato.c to Matching
